'''rozagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ixodoid|ixodoid]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-z-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ixodoid|ixodoid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rozagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || rozagithi || rozagiji || rozagishi || rozagiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || rozaguthu || rozaguju || rozagushu || rozaguku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || rozaguthu || rozaguju || rozagushu || rozaguku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || rozagufthuf || rozagufjuf || rozagufshuf || rozagufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || rozagethe || rozageje || rozageshe || rozageke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || rozagotho || rozagojo || rozagosho || rozagoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || rozagotho || rozagojo || rozagosho || rozagoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || rozagofthof || rozagofjof || rozagofshof || rozagofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || rozagïfthïf || rozagïfjïf || rozagïfshïf || rozagïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || rozagïfthïf || rozagïfjïf || rozagïfshïf || rozagïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || rozagïfthïf || rozagïfjïf || rozagïfshïf || rozagïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || rozagïfthïf || rozagïfjïf || rozagïfshïf || rozagïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || rozagæthæ || rozagæjæ || rozagæshæ || rozagækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || rozagatha || rozagaja || rozagasha || rozagaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || rozagatha || rozagaja || rozagasha || rozagaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || rozagafthaf || rozagafjaf || rozagafshaf || rozagafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || rozagasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || rozagshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || rozagroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || rozagmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || rozagyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gorozagnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gorozagnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gorozagnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gorozagnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || rozazagasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || rozazagshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || rozazagroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || rozazagmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || rozazagyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gorozazagnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gorozazagnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gorozazagnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gorozazagnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || rezægasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || rezægshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || rezægroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || rezægmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || rezægyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gorezægnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gorezægnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gorezægnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gorezægnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || rozfagasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || rozfagshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || rozfagroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || rozfagmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || rozfagyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gorozfagnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gorozfagnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gorozfagnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gorozfagnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
